prompt: Ultra-realistic iPhone photograph taken by the seaside during sunset. A handsome Korean young man is sitting naturally on a large coastal rock, captured from slightly to the side in a waist-up composition. His soft dark hair reaches his ears and gently blows in the ocean breeze, with a few strands falling across his face. He has smooth light warm-toned skin, delicate Korean facial features, straight brows, soft lips, and a calm, peaceful expression with a subtle smile. He is wearing a relaxed white linen button-up shirt with a few top buttons undone, loose light gray-blue wide-leg trousers, and gray Nike Dunk sneakers. His physique is lean and athletic with broad shoulders and a slim waist. Around his neck is a delicate silver necklace with the letter "N" surrounded by small diamonds. The background features a calm gray-blue sea and a glowing golden sunset reflecting softly on the water. He is looking slightly toward the camera instead of directly at it, creating a candid atmosphere. His face is perfectly visible and sharply focused. Natural skin texture, realistic details, soft cinematic lighting, gentle wind movement, authentic iPhone photography aesthetic, ultra-photorealistic, high detail, serene mood, shallow depth of field, editorial lifestyle photography.
